heading: Wind lease sales for areas of the outer Continental Shelf offshore of territories of the United States
label: 1356c Wind lease sales for areas of the outer Continental Shelf offshore of territories of the United States

children.heading: Wind lease sales off coasts of territories of the United States1So in original. There is no subsec. (b).1
children.label: a Wind lease sales off coasts of territories of the United States1So in original. There is no subsec. (b).1

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall issue calls for information and nominations for proposed wind lease sales for areas of the outer Continental Shelf described in paragraph (2) that are determined to be feasible.

children.heading: Initial call
children.label: B Initial call
children.text: Not later than , the Secretary shall issue an initial call for information and nominations under this paragraph.September 30, 2025

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary has concluded that a wind lease sale in the area is feasible.

children.label: B
children.text: The Secretary has determined that there is sufficient interest in leasing the area.

children.label: C
children.text: The Secretary has consulted with the Governor of the territory regarding the suitability of the area for wind energy development.
